productDisplayName: Puma Men's Future Cat Remix Black Shoe
description: A classic motorsport design mixed with a contemporary street look has brought forth these low profile puma Future cat Remix sneakers.Upper Features a low-profile design made for the avid motorsport enthusiast Premium leather upper for longer wear Low-profile cupsole and a functional stabilizer on both sides of the foot Bold, contrasting formstrip logo outlining Asymmetrical lacing system alleviating pressure points Midsole Cushioned footbed for enhanced comfort Scuderia ferrari logo shield Outsole Rubber outsole for enhanced traction Rubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorption
